summary: Plan only. #85103 remains the live canonical issue for the model fallback chain bypass on provider failures. #87545 is related test coverage but is not a merge or fixed-by candidate because real behavior proof failed and this job blocks merge/fix actions. #84583 stays related but separate because it tracks broader session-file writer races rather than the fallback-chain root cause. Closed linked refs are historical only.
